root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_name, prename||member_name||' '||member_surname, sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.salary_amount , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group
where ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) and ( sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code <> '3' ) -- and (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no between :9500 and : a9000 ) /*and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = '9500' ) */ /*and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type <> 'ฉฉ' ) ) */ /*WHERE*/
